executive_summary: Build failure detected in attempt 2. The build process failed during GitHub Actions workflow dispatch phase with HTTP 500 Internal Server Error. This indicates a configuration or infrastructure issue preventing the workflow from being triggered, rather than a code compilation or test failure.

errors.error_message: HTTP Error 500: Internal Server Error. Failed to run workflow dispatch
errors.root_cause: GitHub Actions workflow dispatch API returned 500 error, indicating server-side issue or misconfiguration in workflow file path or permissions
errors.impact: Build cannot be initiated. Blocks entire CI/CD pipeline.

recommended_fixes.description: Verify workflow file exists at correct path
recommended_fixes.expected_outcome: Workflow file should be present and accessible

recommended_fixes.action: Parse and validate build.yml for syntax errors
recommended_fixes.expected_outcome: Valid YAML with no syntax errors

recommended_fixes.action: Check repository settings for Actions permissions and workflow_dispatch event enablement
steps: Navigate to repository Settings > Actions > General
Verify workflow permissions allow read and write
Check if workflow_dispatch trigger is properly configured in build.yml

recommended_fixes.action: Implement retry logic for transient GitHub API failures
recommended_fixes.implementation: Add retry mechanism with 3 attempts, 5-second intervals
recommended_fixes.expected_outcome: Successful dispatch on retry if issue is transient

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Error logged at workflow dispatch phase. No code changes deployed.
compliance_notes.security_impact: None - failure occurred before code execution
compliance_notes.regulatory_compliance: No compliance impact - build did not execute

troubleshooting_steps: Step 1: Verify GitHub API status at https://www.githubstatus.com/
Step 2: Check repository Actions tab for any disabled workflows
Step 3: Validate authentication token has workflow dispatch permissions
Step 5: Test workflow dispatch manually via GitHub UI
Step 6: Check GitHub Actions logs for any rate limiting or quota issues
prevention_measures: Implement health check before workflow dispatch
Add workflow validation in pre-commit hooks
Set up monitoring alerts for workflow dispatch failures

immediate_actions: Verify GitHub Actions workflow file exists and is valid
Check GitHub API status for any ongoing incidents
short_term_actions: Implement retry logic for workflow dispatch
Add workflow file validation to CI/CD pipeline
Set up monitoring for workflow dispatch failures
long_term_actions: Create runbook for workflow dispatch troubleshooting

audit_log.next_steps: Execute automated fixes FIX-001-A and FIX-001-B, then manual verification FIX-001-C
